package-manager.reason: This project uses Bun. Use 'bun install', 'bun add', or 'bun remove' instead of npm/yarn/pnpm.

task-runner.reason: This project uses Bun. Use 'bunx' or 'bun run' instead of npx.

test-runner.reason: This project uses Bun's built-in test runner. Use 'bun test' instead of jest/vitest/mocha.

extra_banned_commands.reason: Recursive force-remove can cause irreversible data loss. Use specific paths and 'rm -r' with care.
Force-pushing destroys shared history. Use '--force-with-lease' for safer forced updates.
Force-pushing destroys shared history. Use '--force-with-lease' for safer forced updates.
